body_txt: Depending on the setting, this may spell some disaster, due to meddling with the fabric of the universe and/or existence, since the character's previous/present/posterior reincarnations physically exist at the same time, in the same place. Related to Anatomy of the Soul . Compare Never the Selves Shall Meet , which refers to Time Travel and temporal versions of the same character that cannot exist in the same vicinity, lest something happens to the universe. See also My Future Self and Me , in which a future version of a character (but not necessarily a reincarnation) meets their past self. Compare with I Hate Past Me , if the character considers the previous incarnation a version of themselves.
